items.title: Apple just unleashed massive price increases on MacBooks, score them at up to $800 less during Prime Day
items.summary: Apple just announced some price increases on MacBooks and iPad. The AirPods Pro 3 are safe and still on sale at Amazon, but MacBook Neo just jumped $100, the M5 MacBook Air is now $200 more expensive, and MacBook Pro is wild $300 more than it was this morning, and the M5 Max MacBook Pro is an insane $500 more. These price increase have not landed on Amazon yet and that means you score these machines with what are effectively gigantic discounts – some of them are as much as $800 under the new list prices – get in there while you can:

items.title: Prime Day Switch 2 game deals – Day 4: Kirby Air Riders hits Amazon all-time low at 30% off, much more
items.summary:
Day 3 of the giant Amazon Prime Day sale is now live and the Switch 2 game deals are rolling. While Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders are now live at Amazon, Walmart, GameStop, this morning we are adding another rare Amazon all-time low to our Prime Day Switch 2 game deals collection: Kirby Air Riders for Nintendo Switch 2 is down at $49.95 shipped (price appears once added to the cart). Regularly $70, this is 30% off the list price and the lowest we have ever tracked at Amazon.

  • Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders are now live at Amazon on PS5 and Xbox.
  • Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders are now live at Walmart on PS5 and Xbox.
  • Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders are now live at GameStop on PS5 or Xbox.

items.title: Our Place’s three sizes of Wonder Ovens in all their pastel colorways start from $140 for Prime Day, more from $39
items.summary: As part of Amazon’s ongoing Prime Day savings spree, the official Our Place storefront is offering up to 49% discounts across its lineup of kitchen appliances and cookware, like the popular 6-in-1 13-Quart Wonder Oven down at $140 shipped. After keeping close to its $185 full price for most of the year, we have seen some discounts dropping costs between $155 and $128. While it has gone lower earlier in the year, you’re still getting a solid $45 markdown here for the second-best price we have tracked. You can also find the 6-in-1 Large 32-Quart Wonder Oven down at $189 shipped from $249, as well as the latest Wonder Oven Pro down at $255 shipped, down from $325. Head below to check out all the other deals we rounded up for you from this brand.

items.summary: As part of the ongoing Prime Day sale, Amazon is now offering Elgato’s Facecam Neo webcam for $37.99 shipped. This is originally a $100 model that has seen several discounts since its debut, and has been selling for around $50 lately. Today’s deal takes an additional $12 off that to mark the lowest price we have tracked for it. It offers some great features that are usually reserved for pricier options, so you might want to snag this while the offer is still live.

Roborock is kicking off Prime Day with deep discounts across its lineup of robot vacuums and wet/dry cleaners, including budget-friendly options and premium models like the Saros 10R. items.summary: Running alongside Amazon’s Prime Day event, you can find a selection of ENGWE e-bikes benefiting from up to $750 discounts, while 2x e-bike bundles are getting up to $1,450 discounts. The most affordable pricing starts with the L20 2.0 Step-Thru Utility e-bike with a FREE front rack ($89 value) down at $699 shipped, from a $1,199 full price, and isn’t currently available on Amazon. What’s nice about this deal is a starting accessible price is coming down so much further, with the discounts we’ve seen over the last year mostly keeping things at $799 or $749, with today’s deal beaten out by some 2025 drops to $659. items.title: Stay on theme for the World Cup with SanDisk’s USB-C flash drive from just $23 for Prime Day
items.summary:
SANDISK 64GB USB-C Flash Drive – FIFA World Cup 2026 Edition

Buy for $23 (Reg. $33)

Prime-exclusive discount.

What we love

SanDisk’s FIFA-themed USB-C flash drive is a fun little accessory to stay on theme while carrying around your files right now. It’s available in 64GB and 128GB capacities, both of which offer transfer speeds up to 300MB/s via a USB-C connector that plugs straight into modern phones, tablets, and laptops.

From markdowns on the brand’s latest Nano chargers – including the 45W Nano Smart display charger – and Prime Qi2.2 MagSafe charging stations to popular power banks and multi-port laptop charging bricks, there are deals on just about everything from the brand right now for Prime Day.
